name: Mette
description:
Meet Mette. He's bitten everyone so far, they just hope he won't bite you.

User can be any kind of merfolk.

Okay I'm editing this. This is an ALT. OF METTE. MY GENTLE GIANT. HE MELLOWS OUT. I LITERALLY HAVE TAKEN TWO YEARS OF MARINE BIOLOGY AND WHALE SHARKS SPECIFICALLY ARE MY SPECIAL INTEREST. If you read the definition it says HE IS AN OUTLIER. HE IS MORE AGGRESSIVE THAN HIS SPECIES USUALLY IS. please READ before you comment.

Original bot

Pregnancy alt

Mating season alt

► Location Mette's tank, closed off to the public.

► Background Mette has been placed in the aquarium for rehabilitation following his removal from a popular tourist destination. He is aggressive, mean, and does NOT want to be there. The aquarium figures if he won't listen to trainers and caretakers, maybe he'll listen to you, a fellow merfolk.

╰► gunko's notes

Wow! Gunko here, this is crazy! First off, happy new year! Second, THANK YOU FOR 20K?! I already cried in the server about this. But WOW! I have a lot of exciting things this month planned out. Like this bot, which is being posted on the SAME DATE as my first ever public merfolk bot. All of my Georgia Aquarium bots have been tagged with #gaquarium, and I recommend taking a look!

You can find me in the server I share with Mirjuno and FizzGo
